hero.name: CESAR GOMEZ
hero.title: Senior Vue/Nuxt · AI & NLP Expert
hero.description: Expert in AI/NLP engineering (local and cloud) and turning agent-assisted code into production-ready systems. 13+ years in Vue.js, Nuxt, and TypeScript with fullstack depth.

modal.title: Vibe Coding Cleanup Specialist
modal.lead: AI accelerates delivery. Craft keeps it shippable. I work at that intersection.
modal.whyBody: Used well, AI multiplies what strong engineers can ship: agents compress scaffolding and exploration, NLP unlocks product experiences that once needed whole research teams, and local or cloud models let you prototype with intent. The win is faster feedback loops — without replacing judgment, architecture, or ownership.
modal.riskBody: When vibe coding runs without deep understanding of architecture, security, and maintainability, you get fragile systems: duplicated logic, hallucinated APIs, silent regressions, and code nobody can own. Speed without craft becomes technical debt that compounds the moment real users and production pressure arrive.
modal.roleTitle: My work as Vibe Coding Cleanup Specialist
modal.roleBody: I take agent-assisted codebases and turn them into production-ready systems — clarifying architecture, hardening quality gates, and preserving the velocity AI enables without sacrificing craft.
points: Audit agent-generated code for architecture fitness, security gaps, and maintainability risks.
Refactor vibe-coded surfaces into typed, testable modules a team can own long-term.
Coach AI-assisted workflows that amplify senior judgment instead of replacing it.

about.title: Fullstack Depth.
about.description1: As a Senior Fullstack Developer with a specialized focus on Frontend Architecture, I've spent 13+ years bridging the gap between pixel-perfect design and scalable systems.
about.description2: My trajectory through Colegium and LingoQuesto has been defined by a single obsession: creating high-performance user experiences powered by robust, resilient backend foundations.
about.philosophyQuote: As a Frontend Focused Fullstack, I believe the interface is where engineering meets impact.
about.vibeCodingDesc: Vibe Coding Cleanup Specialist — production quality from agent-assisted code.

lingoquesto.title: Founding Member | Senior Fullstack
lingoquesto.desc: Founding fullstack engineer on an AI/NLP conversational ed-tech product. Wrapping up in August 2026.
highlights: Founding engineer shaping product vision and fullstack technical roadmap for an AI/NLP-powered ed-tech platform focused on oral language practice.
Built interactive, personalized conversational experiences across LQ-V2 and LQ-V3 for educators and students, plus admin workflows for elevated roles.
Led frontend architecture with Nuxt 4, Vue 3, Vuetify, Tailwind CSS, PrimeVue, and TypeScript, with cross-stack contributions when needed.
Contributed backend business logic with Django (Python), GraphQL (LQ-V2), and REST APIs (LQ-V3) to turn content into usable product experiences.

Integrated and operated AI/NLP models locally and in the cloud, and used coding agents (Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Claude Code, OpenCode) plus local runtimes (Ollama, llama.cpp) to ship faster without lowering the quality bar.
Raised engineering standards, delivery velocity, and product decisions as part of the founding team.

colegium.title: Senior Frontend Developer
colegium.desc: Orchestrating complex ecosystems and micro-frontend architectures for 100k+ students.
highlights: Developed 12 modules, 3 internal tools, and 3 shared libraries used across Colegium Cloud with Vue.js 3 Web Components and hybrid delivery models.
Helped build the next generation of cloud-based educational tools, improving the experience for more than 100,000 students.
Contributed to the Design System ecosystem, establishing UI/UX standards that reduced development time by 30%.
Participated in innovation labs, prototyping and promoting new educational technology solutions.
Integrated single-page applications (SPA) with CodeIgniter Blade engines to optimize web performance.
Earned 4th place at Colegium Hackathon 2024 with an AI-powered ticketing and helpdesk chatbot for user administration.

tissini.title: Senior Frontend Developer
tissini.desc: Developed mobile-first solutions with Vue 3. Reduced deployment times by 60% via CI/CD.
highlights: Built mobile-first solutions using Vue.js 2 and 3 with both Options and Composition APIs.
Supported engineering processes by implementing agile methodologies across the development lifecycle.
Established CI/CD pipelines that reduced deployment times by 60%.
Mentored junior developers on Vue.js best practices and frontend craftsmanship.
Contributed to customer-facing products including Mitiendatissini.com and the TISSINI App.

cuartopixel.title: Web Frontend Developer
cuartopixel.desc: Crafted high-performance UX/UI web experiences using Angular 6+ for modern ecosystems.
highlights: Developed UX/UI-driven web application experiences with Angular 6+.
Delivered performant, user-centered interfaces for digital marketing and content platforms.
Worked within a multidisciplinary team spanning engineering, content, and digital strategy.
Applied modern frontend practices to ship polished web experiences in fast-moving product cycles.

quehaypahacer.title: Frontend Developer · IT Project Coordinator
quehaypahacer.desc: Led planning, development, and administration of digital marketing tech — frontend lead on the Que Hay Pa' Hacer Cartagena app.
highlights: Owned planning, management, development, and administration of the technologies used to create and support digital marketing and advertising products.
Frontend developer and project lead for Que Hay Pa' Hacer Cartagena App (mobile and web), plus a web app for property-owner clients.

zabud.title: Junior Frontend Developer
zabud.desc: Visual development using AngularJS, HTML5, CSS3, and jQuery for tailored modular solutions.
highlights: Built custom software solutions with a focus on the visual layer of web applications.
Developed modular webapps using AngularJS, HTML5, CSS3, and jQuery.
Translated business requirements into maintainable frontend implementations.
Gained foundational experience in client-side architecture and tailored enterprise interfaces.

data.name: Carol Valdebenito
data.quote: I worked for almost 5 years with César in two different teams, from my role as Scrum Master, and if there is one thing I can say with total certainty is that he is one of the best front-ends I have worked with. He has a rare ability: he develops thinking about failure. He doesn't just focus on 'how to make it work', but on 'how to prevent it from failing', contemplating a thousand possible scenarios, even the most improbable ones. That obsession with use cases makes his developments stable, robust, and hard to break. He is methodical, committed, and has an admirable work ethic. It was a pleasure working with him, and without a doubt, I would do it again.

data.name: Michell Jose Gutierrez Rincon
data.quote: Excellent colleague, great developer and expert in frontend technologies

data.name: Genito Javier Andrade Perez
data.quote: I had the privilege of working alongside César G. on several projects and I can say with total confidence that he is a highly competent, committed developer with great attention to detail. He stands out for his mastery of modern technologies, his ability to turn complex designs into functional and efficient interfaces, and his focus centered on user experience. In addition to his technical skills, César has an exemplary collaborative attitude, always willing to share knowledge and provide effective solutions.

data.name: Andres Felipe Ordoñez Zuluaga
data.quote: It is a pleasure to recommend César, an exceptional professional with whom I had the privilege of working. César not only possesses deep technical experience, but also stands out for his outstanding management and innovation capabilities. He constantly demonstrated a unique ability to lead projects, optimize processes, and propose creative solutions that drove the team's success. His commitment to excellence and his innovative vision make him an invaluable asset to any organization.

data.name: María de los Ángeles Rodríguez
data.quote: It is a pleasure to recommend people with great commitment and growth. If we are talking about an integral talent, Cesar meets the requirements. He is passionate about what he does, responsible, organized, intelligent, leader and excellent human service.

items.question: Who is Cesar Gomez?
items.answer: Cesar Gomez is a senior fullstack developer with a frontend focus and 13+ years of experience in Vue.js, Nuxt.js, and TypeScript. He has built products for ed-tech platforms including Colegium (100k+ students) and LingoQuesto.

items.question: What technologies does Cesar Gomez specialize in?
items.answer: Vue.js, Nuxt.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, PrimeVue, Tailwind CSS, design systems, micro-frontends, SSR/SSG, and web performance optimization.

items.question: Is Cesar Gomez available for hire?
items.answer: Yes. Cesar is open to senior frontend, fullstack, and architecture roles on a contract basis. Target availability is August 2026 and he works remotely with international teams.

items.question: What is Cesar Gomez's experience with Vue.js and Nuxt.js?
items.answer: He has led frontend architecture with Vue 3 and Nuxt in production, including micro-frontend ecosystems, shared libraries, Web Components, and performance-critical educational platforms.

items.question: How do I hire a senior Vue.js frontend developer?
items.answer: You can hire Cesar Gomez for senior Vue.js and Nuxt contract work. Review his portfolio at cesargomez.dev, the Vue developer profile at cesargomez.dev/vue-frontend-developer, and contact him via the form, LinkedIn, or GitHub.

items.question: Is Cesar Gomez a good fit as a Vue frontend developer for remote teams?
items.answer: Yes. He is a senior Vue frontend developer based in Colombia with 13+ years of experience, production work at Colegium and LingoQuesto, and remote collaboration with distributed teams in English and Spanish.

items.question: Where is Cesar Gomez based?
items.answer: Cesar is based in Colombia and works remotely with teams across Latin America and globally.

items.question: How can I contact Cesar Gomez?
items.answer: Use the contact form at cesargomez.dev, connect on LinkedIn, or review his open-source work on GitHub.

items.question: What companies has Cesar Gomez worked with?
items.answer: Recent experience includes LingoQuesto (founding engineer), Colegium (senior frontend), and prior roles across TISSINI, Zabud, Cuarto Pixel, and other product teams.

items.question: Does Cesar Gomez work in English and Spanish?
items.answer: Yes. Cesar is a native Spanish speaker with intermediate English and has collaborated with distributed international teams.
